changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.descriptionNewUser: Your initial password is 123456. We recommend changing it for better security.
changePassword.descriptionExisting: Enter your current password and the new desired password.

validation.minLength: New password must be at least 6 characters

home.title: Dashboard
home.subtitle: This is the modeler's dashboard

encouragement.title: You've already started
encouragement.text: Registering a few more items makes your collection much easier to track.

whyContinue.title: Why continue now?
whyContinue.text: Modelers who register a few items can better track what's in progress, avoid duplicate purchases, and better organize their build time.

emptyState.title: Your ModelHero is empty.
emptyState.subtitle: Register your first kit to start organizing your collection.
emptyState.benefit: Modelers who register at least 1 kit get much more out of ModelHero
emptyState.tip: Start with the kit you have closest at hand
emptyState.note: Takes less than 1 minute • You can edit later

advancedTools.title: Advanced tools — use when you want

recentGlobalKits.title: Recently added kits by ModelHero users worldwide

home.photoWithAI: Register via photo with AI (much faster)

welcomeModal.title: Let's organize your first item now
welcomeModal.description: Without this, ModelHero can't help you yet.
welcomeModal.tryAI: Try our AI: Register by sending a photo or link with the kit
welcomeModal.closing: This is the first step to organizing your collection.
welcomeModal.microcopy: Takes less than 1 minute • You can edit later

firstKitModal.title: Good start. Now let's really get organized.
firstKitModal.description: With your first item registered, you've taken the first step. Register 2 more items to start seeing what's in progress, what comes next, and where your time is being invested.

thirdKitModal.title: Great progress
thirdKitModal.description: Now ModelHero is starting to see patterns in your collection.
thirdKitModal.encouragement: Register 2 more items to get a complete view of what's in progress, what comes next, and where your time is being invested.

fifthItemModal.title: Now your ModelHero is really working.
fifthItemModal.description: With 5 items registered, you've moved past the trial phase and into real organization.
fifthItemModal.benefit1: see what's in progress and what's on hold
fifthItemModal.benefit2: understand where your time and money are being invested
fifthItemModal.benefit3: plan your next kits with more clarity
fifthItemModal.conclusion: This is the point where organization starts paying off.
fifthItemModal.microcopy: The more items you register, the more useful ModelHero becomes.

seventhItemModal.title: Your collection is growing!
seventhItemModal.freePlanInfo: The free plan is ideal for getting started and understanding your organization.
seventhItemModal.limitInfo: If you keep growing, you'll soon reach the natural limit of this plan.
seventhItemModal.noChange: Nothing changes now — this is just so you know and can plan ahead.

tenthItemModal.title: You've reached the free plan limit.
tenthItemModal.description: You've registered 10 items and are already using ModelHero consistently.
tenthItemModal.continueInfo: From here, to continue organizing your collection without interruptions, you need to be on the full plan.
tenthItemModal.fullPlanAllows: The full plan allows you to:

features.continuous: Use ModelHero as a continuous system, not just a trial

tenthItemModal.naturalStep: This is the natural step for those who decided to take organization seriously.
tenthItemModal.microcopy: You can continue exactly where you left off after upgrading.

firstKit.title: Mission accomplished!
firstKit.text:
This kit is now part of your completed collection. Organization, progress, and dedication — all tracked in ModelHero.
Ready for the next challenge?

rotation1.title: Project completed!
rotation1.text:
Congratulations! You've finished another kit and taken one more step in your journey as an organized modeler.
How about picking your next project and tracking every step with ModelHero?

rotation2.title: Another one done!
rotation2.text:
This project is now part of your completed collection. Every finished kit shows your growth as a modeler.
Ready to start the next one?

rotation3.title: Kit completed successfully!
rotation3.text:
Another project completed and documented. Organization today, pride tomorrow.
Keep building and tracking everything with ModelHero.

rotation4.title: Excellent work!
rotation4.text:
Finishing a kit is always a victory. Watching your collection grow in an organized way is even better.
Time to choose your next project.

rotation5.title: Project wrapped up!
rotation5.text:
Every recorded step tells the story of your build. This kit is now completed and cataloged.
On to the next one?

paintConverter.title: Paint Matching
paintConverter.description: Find equivalent paints from different brands
paintConverter.searchDescription: Search by name, FS/RAL/RLM code or paint code (e.g.: XF-62, H309, AK755)
paintConverter.camoSearchDescription: Search USAF/USMC/US Army/NATO camouflage schemes (aircraft name, vehicle, period, etc.)

boxScan.title: Register via Box Photo
boxScan.description: AI is analyzing the photo to identify kits and extract information.
boxScan.kitsAddedSuccess: The kits have been added to your collection. You can edit them to complete the information.
boxScan.noKitsFound: Could not identify kits in the photo.
boxScan.tryBetterPhoto: Try taking a clearer photo of the box or side of the kit.
boxScan.errorAnalyzing: Could not analyze the photo. Please try again.
boxScan.errorProcessing: Error processing the photo. Please try again.

duplicateChecker.title: Duplicate Detector
duplicateChecker.description: Check if a product (kit, paint or material) is already in your collection before buying.
duplicateChecker.textSearchDesc: Enter product name, brand or code
duplicateChecker.textPlaceholder: E.g.: Tamiya F-15C 1/48, Vallejo 71.062, Mr.Color C1...
duplicateChecker.urlSearchDesc: Paste the product URL from an online store
duplicateChecker.duplicatesFoundDesc: This product may already be in your collection.
duplicateChecker.noDuplicatesDesc: This product appears to be a new purchase.
duplicateChecker.noMatch: No duplicates found in your collection
duplicateChecker.checkError: Error checking for duplicates. Please try again.
duplicateChecker.premiumDescription: The Duplicate Detector is only available for Full plan subscribers. Avoid buying items you already own!

favoriteLinks.noLinksHint: Add favorite modeling sites and stores for quick access

favoriteLinks.linkRemovedDesc: The link has been removed from your favorites.

aiUpgrade.description: AI is already helping you organize your collection better, save time, and make faster decisions.
aiUpgrade.callToAction: To keep using AI without limits and take your organization to the next level, the Full plan unlocks ModelHero's full potential.

benefits.historyControl: History, control, and full visibility of your progress

1.title: First Step!
1.description: You started your journey as an organized modeler. Keep registering your items!

2.title: Your virtual shelf is starting to take shape!
2.description: You already have 8 models protected and organized.

3.title: Dedicated Collector!
3.description: With 20 items registered, your collection already impresses. Keep it up!

4.title: Master Modeler!
4.description: 50 items! You are a true hobby enthusiast. Your organization is exemplary!

5.title: Legendary!
5.description: 100 items registered! You've reached the maximum level. Your collection is a true work of art!
